title: lithocardium niveum
intro: Lithocardium niveum, commonly known as Snowdonia lilyturf or Snowdon lilyturf, is a perennial plant species in the family Asphodelaceae. It is native to the mountains of Wales and is used in traditional herbal medicine. The health benefits of Lithocardium niveum include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, while its therapeutic actions include cardiotonic and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Lithocardium niveum include saponins and flavonoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
